top.title: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship not start of pandemic, UN health agency says
top.summary: Ther World Health Organization says it is not in the same situation as with Covid-19 because hantavirus spreads differently.

top.title: Trump's 'irresponsible war' to blame for economic slowdown, German minister says
top.summary: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.

top.title: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
top.summary: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.

top.title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
top.summary: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

top.title: The no-nonsense judge calling the shots in Musk v Altman trial
top.summary: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.

top.title: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
top.summary: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
